name: knowzcode
description: Platform-agnostic AI development methodology with TDD, quality gates, and structured workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Structured coding workflows and local handoffs for Codex
interface.longDescription: Package the KnowzCode methodology for Codex with Codex-native workflow skills, local context-clearing handoffs, coordinator/subagent execution guidance, and the support files those workflows read from the initialized project.
defaultPrompt: Run or audit a KnowzCode workflow for this feature or refactor
